hero.title: Scalable Profit Engineering
hero.subtitle: I've managed $8,000,000+ in ad budgets to move e-commerce stores from stagnation to profitable scale. We don't buy clicks — we build systems that attract high-LTV customers.

about.title: About Me
about.description:
I'm a results-driven media buyer with over 7 years of experience in paid social advertising, conversion optimization, and data-driven marketing strategies. My approach combines analytical rigor with creative testing to deliver measurable ROI improvements for every client.

I specialize in scaling e-commerce brands through systematic ad account optimization, audience development, and creative strategy. My clients typically see a 40-60% improvement in ROAS within the first 90 days of partnership.

Beyond campaign management, I build automated reporting systems, develop attribution models, and create scalable processes that help teams make data-driven decisions faster.

projects.title: Fashion E-commerce Scale
projects.description: Scaled a fashion e-commerce brand from $50K to $500K monthly ad spend while maintaining 4.2x ROAS. Implemented dynamic product ads, lookalike audiences, and automated bidding strategies.

projects.title: SaaS Lead Generation
projects.description: Built a lead generation system that reduced CPA by 60% while doubling monthly qualified leads. Created multi-touch attribution model to optimize full-funnel performance.

projects.title: DTC Brand Launch
projects.description: Launched a direct-to-consumer brand from zero to $200K monthly revenue in 6 months. Developed creative testing framework that improved CTR by 85%.

experience.title: Senior Media Buyer
experience.description: Managing $2M+ monthly ad spend across multiple e-commerce brands. Achieved average 3.5x ROAS across portfolio. Built automated reporting dashboards and creative testing frameworks.

experience.title: Media Buyer
experience.description: Managed Facebook and Google ad campaigns for 15+ e-commerce clients. Reduced average CPA by 35% through systematic optimization and creative testing.

experience.title: Marketing Specialist
experience.description: Built paid acquisition channels from scratch, growing monthly spend from $5K to $150K. Implemented tracking infrastructure and attribution modeling.

services.title: Paid Advertising
services.description: Full-funnel paid social and search advertising campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, Google, and TikTok. From strategy to execution and ongoing optimization.

services.title: Conversion Optimization
services.description: Data-driven landing page optimization, A/B testing, and funnel analysis to maximize ROI. Identify and fix conversion bottlenecks.

services.title: Analytics & Attribution
services.description: Custom dashboards, tracking implementation, and attribution modeling to make data-driven decisions with confidence.

services.title: Creative Strategy
services.description: Systematic creative testing frameworks and ad production workflows to continuously improve ad performance.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hi! I saw your portfolio and would like to discuss a potential project.
